FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct GradientSpec

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

A gradient fill. AngleDeg is the linear axis (0 = left-to-right, 90 = top-to-bottom). Up to 4 stops are carried into the POD draw command; extras are ignored. When set on a node it supersedes the solid fill at record time.

public readonly record struct GradientSpec : IEquatable<GradientSpec>
Implements
IEquatable<GradientSpec>

Constructors

GradientSpec(GradientShape, float, GradientStop[])

A gradient fill. AngleDeg is the linear axis (0 = left-to-right, 90 = top-to-bottom). Up to 4 stops are carried into the POD draw command; extras are ignored. When set on a node it supersedes the solid fill at record time.

public GradientSpec(GradientShape Shape, float AngleDeg, GradientStop[] Stops)

Parameters

Shape GradientShape
AngleDeg float
Stops GradientStop[]

Fields

MaxStops 

public const int MaxStops = 4

Field Value

int

Properties

AnchorEnd

Anchor the absolute band at the END of the axis instead of the start — the engine encoding of WinUI's RelativeTransform ScaleTransform ScaleY="-1" mirror on elevation brushes (light ControlElevationBorder, Common_themeresources_any.xaml:382-390; AccentControlElevationBorder both themes :198-205/:397-404): the darker secondary edge sits at the BOTTOM. Only meaningful with AxisLengthPx > 0.

public bool AnchorEnd { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

AngleDeg 

public float AngleDeg { get; init; }

Property Value

float

AxisLengthPx

WinUI MappingMode="Absolute" (StartPoint 0,0 EndPoint 0,N): the stop ramp occupies this many PHYSICAL px along the axis — outside the band the edge stop's color holds — instead of stretching over the node's full extent. The ControlElevationBorder confines its blend to a 3px band (Common_themeresources_any.xaml:186). 0 (default) = relative-to-bounds. Applied as a record-time stop-offset remap, so the POD command and the gradient shader are unchanged.

public float AxisLengthPx { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Shape 

public GradientShape Shape { get; init; }

Property Value

GradientShape

Stops 

public GradientStop[] Stops { get; init; }

Property Value

GradientStop[]

Methods

Solid(ColorF)

A solid "gradient" (one stop) - so a flat border and a gradient border are the SAME knob (BorderBrush).

public static GradientSpec Solid(ColorF color)

Parameters

color ColorF

Returns

GradientSpec

Vertical(ColorF, ColorF)

A vertical 2-stop linear gradient (top to bottom).

public static GradientSpec Vertical(ColorF top, ColorF bottom)

Parameters

top ColorF
bottom ColorF

Returns

GradientSpec
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
